title: Desire Me
director: Jack Conway, George Cukor, Mervyn LeRoy
writer: Marguerite Roberts, Zoe Akins, Casey Robinson
actors: Greer Garson, Robert Mitchum, Richard Hart
plot: Released from a POW camp at the end of WW2, a French soldier tricks the wife of a fellow POW into believing her husband was killed by the Germans and seduces the grieving woman, but the 'dead' husband eventually returns home.
